CustomField.formula: IF( Received__c, If(ISPickval(Content_Type__c,'text/html'), HYPERLINK(LEFT($Api.Partner_Server_URL_260, FIND( '/services', $Api.Partner_Server_URL_260))+'apex/DocumentViewerHtmlPage?id='+Id,"Click Here","_blank"), HYPERLINK(LEFT($Api.Partner_Server_URL_260, FIND( '/services', $Api.Partner_Server_URL_260))+'apex/DocumentViewer?recordId='+Id,"Click Here","_blank")),'')
CustomField.label: View Document
